fields.label: Google credential JSON
fields.help: Paste a Google authorized_user credential JSON containing a refresh token, or a service-account key JSON. Enable the Tag Manager API in the credential's Google Cloud project. Grant the Google identity access under Tag Manager > Admin > User Management for the relevant account and containers.

fields.label: Default GTM account ID
fields.help: Optional numeric account ID, visible in Tag Manager account settings and API resource paths. Used when a tool call omits accountId.

fields.label: Default GTM container ID
fields.help: Optional numeric container ID from the Tag Manager API, not the public GTM-XXXX ID. Used when a tool call omits containerId.

fields.label: Default GTM workspace ID
fields.help: Optional numeric workspace ID from the Tag Manager API. Used when a tool call omits workspaceId.
